session.notLoggedIn: Not logged in. Choose a test user id and click Login.

profile.title: Profile
profile.loginPrompt: Login with a test user id to view and edit your profile.
profile.createOrUpdate: Create or update your profile for discovery.
profile.editablePublicProfile: This is your editable public profile.
profile.activateAccount: Activate my account so I can swipe and appear in discovery.
profile.photosHint: Add up to 5 photo URLs. Discovery cards will display them as a carousel.
profile.preferencesHint: Configure who you want to discover. Use "Clear" for unrestricted desired age.
profile.userInfoHint: Managed by identity source; cannot be edited here.
profile.userIdPending: Will be assigned after first save
profile.name: Name
profile.activateConfirm: Activate account now? Once activated, you will be visible in discovery and can swipe.
profile.errorAgeRegion: Please fill in both age and region before saving your account.
profile.errorAgeRange: Desired minimum age must be less than or equal to desired maximum age.
profile.errorLoginFirst: Please login with a test user id first.
profile.errorLoadProfile: Failed to load profile. Please retry.
profile.errorLoadOptions: Failed to load profile options. Please retry.
profile.errorChatIdConflict: chat_id is already in use. Please choose a different one.
profile.errorValidation: Validation failed. Please review the form values.

swipe.title: Swipe
swipe.loginPrompt: Login with a test user id to start swiping.
swipe.accountNotActivated: Your account is not activated yet. Activate it in profile to start swiping and appear in discovery.
swipe.allCaughtUpHint: No more candidates right now. Check back later for new profiles.
swipe.startConversation: Start the conversation now using your configured chat app deep link.
swipe.errorUserNotFound: Current user was not found. Please create your profile first.
swipe.errorInvalidSwipe: Swipe request is invalid for this profile.
swipe.errorInvalidData: Invalid swipe data was sent. Please refresh and try again.
swipe.errorResolveUser: Failed to resolve current user. Please retry.

matches.title: Matches
matches.loginPrompt: Login with a test user id to view your matches.
matches.noMatchesYet: No matches yet. Keep swiping to find your next connection.
matches.errorUserNotFound: Current user was not found. Please create your profile first.
